name: Monterey Spaghetti Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Prepare a 8-inch square pan with cooking spray; set aside.
In a mixing bowl, combine egg white, sour cream, parmesan cheese, and garlic powder. Stir in Monterey Jack cheese, hot spaghetti, and mixed vegetables. Pour into prepared pan.
Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes or until heated through.
